title: Zero-to-CAD: Agentic Synthesis of Interpretable CAD Programs at Million-Scale Without Real Data
takeaway: Zero-to-CAD synthesizes 1 million executable CAD construction sequences without real data, achieving an 82.1% success rate with a fine-tuned Qwen3-VL-2B versus 72.2% for GPT-5.2 High arXiv:2604.24479.
